name: California State Insulation
tagline: Sonoma County insulation and general contracting since 2001
seoDescription: California State Insulation is a licensed Santa Rosa insulation and general contractor serving Sonoma County since 2001. Insulation, drywall, stucco and more.

sections.heading: Licensed Santa Rosa insulation and general contracting
sections.subheading: Run by Alvaro Beltran since 2001, California State Insulation handles insulation alongside framing, drywall, stucco and plaster for homes and businesses across Sonoma County.
badges: Serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County since 2001

items.title: Local, Owner-Operated By Alvaro Beltran
items.body: Rooted right here in Santa Rosa, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

sections.heading: About California State Insulation
body: California State Insulation & General Contractor has worked out of Santa Rosa since 2001. Owner Alvaro Beltran built the company on insulation work and grew it into a full general contracting operation, holding both the C-2 Insulation and Acoustical and the B General Building classifications under California license #795223.

From the shop on Tapadera Drive, the crew serves homeowners and businesses across Sonoma County. Beyond insulation, they take on framing, stucco, interior plaster, drywall, concrete and demolition — handling the building envelope and the work around it on the same job.
highlights: Serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County since 2001
Licensed CSLB #795223 — Insulation & Acoustical (C-2) and General Building (B)
Insulation plus full general contracting: framing, drywall, stucco, plaster

items.title: Insulation
items.description: Insulation installation for residential and commercial buildings under the company's C-2 Insulation and Acoustical license.

items.title: Framing
items.description: Structural framing as part of new construction, additions and remodels.

items.title: Stucco
items.description: Exterior stucco application for new builds and repairs.

items.title: Interior Plaster & Drywall
items.description: Interior plaster and drywall installation and finishing.

items.title: Concrete
items.description: Concrete work for foundations, slabs and related construction.

items.title: Demolition
items.description: Demolition to prepare sites for new construction and remodels.

sections.heading: Work with California State Insulation
sections.body: Find us at 1244 Tapadera Dr. Call (707) 546-3177 — we’re glad to help.
